title: Senda ignorada
writer: José Fernández Gómez, José Antonio Nieves Conde, Antonio Pérez Sánchez
actors: Enrique Guitart, Alicia Palacios, Fernando Nogueras
plot: Guido Morani is a gangster who always gets away with his crimes, to the despair of Inspector Russell, and the few times he gets judged gets to be acquitted, until he falls in love with a married woman.
